bug_summary: 扩展加载失败后未遍历输出 errors，用户看不到具体失败扩展和原因
fix_summary: 加载扩展后遍历 extensionsResult.errors 并 console.error 输出每个失败记录
wrong_behavior: 扩展加载失败时无错误输出，用户不知道哪个扩展失败
correct_behavior: 每个失败扩展输出 Failed to load extension "path": error 到 stderr

preconditions.what: 扩展目录中存在无法加载的扩展

assertions.what: stderr 包含失败扩展路径
assertions.expected: console.error called with 'Failed to load extension'
error message includes extension path and error
